name: q
label: Search Query
help: Seed keyword to expand into autocomplete suggestions, e.g. skincare.

name: country
label: Country
help: Two-letter ISO country code that localizes suggestions to a market, e.g. US, GB, DE. Default US.

name: language
label: Language
help: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 100. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
